title: anemone vesicatoria subsp. humilis
intro: Anemone vesicatoria subsp. humilis, also known as the bladder anemone, is a plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloid content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The bladder anemone is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, including eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
